name: Lemon Sponge Pie Vvkx95a
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until fluffy.
2. Beat in egg yolks, flour, salt, milk, lemon zest, and lemon juice.
3. In a small bowl with clean beaters, beat 2 egg whites until stiff but not dry.
4. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the milk mixture.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pie shell.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 15 minutes.
7. Reduce the heat to 300°F and bake for an additional 45 minutes.
8. The top should be golden brown, and an inserted knife will come out clean.
Enjoy your Lemon Sponge Pie! My whole family loves this recipe, which has been in our family for at least 60 years.
